_comment: Reference file for ALL slash commands available in LCDLLN client. Used to enforce RBAC (Role-Based Access Control) and ensure server-side audit logging. Every new slash command MUST be added here BEFORE implementation. The 'minRole' field gates execution: only users with this role or higher (in the hierarchy player < moderator < game_master < administrator) can invoke the command. The 'serverInteraction' flag indicates whether the command sends a packet to the master ; the 'serverLogged' flag forces server-side audit logging even for client-only commands. Per project policy, all commands must be serverLogged=true ; client-only commands must still emit a log opcode at execution.

_status_legend.client_only_legacy: Command intercepts client-side, no rbac, no server log -- to refactor

categories.ui_panel: Toggle a UI panel (visual only, no state change)

commands.description: Toggle the Mail panel (read inbox, compose, attach items).
commands.notes: Wave 3 RBAC migration : client toggles localement et envoie un AdminCommand audit (opcode 195) au master qui log [AdminCommand] result=OK.

commands.description: Toggle the Quest log panel.
commands.notes: Wave 3 RBAC migration : audit log only (toggle UI client-side).

commands.description: Toggle the Trade window with the targeted player.
Toggle the Reputation panel (factions standing).
commands.notes: Wave 3 RBAC migration : audit log only (toggle UI client-side).

commands.description: Toggle the Skill book panel (cooking, herbalism, etc.).
commands.notes: Wave 3 RBAC migration : audit log only (toggle UI client-side).

commands.description: Toggle the Looking For Group panel.
commands.notes: Wave 3 RBAC migration : audit log only (toggle UI client-side).

commands.description: Toggle the Arena panel (team list, queue, match results).
commands.notes: Wave 3 RBAC migration : audit log only (toggle UI client-side).

commands.description: Toggle the BattleGround panel (queue, scoreboard).
commands.notes: Wave 3 RBAC migration : audit log only (toggle UI client-side).

commands.description: Toggle the OutdoorPvP panel (zones, objectives, captures).
commands.notes: Wave 3 RBAC migration : audit log only (toggle UI client-side).

commands.description: Toggle the Weather panel (zones, current state).
commands.notes: Wave 3 RBAC migration : audit log only (toggle UI client-side).

commands.description: Toggle the Game Events panel (seasonal events, lunar gates).
commands.notes: Wave 3 RBAC migration : audit log only (toggle UI client-side).

commands.description: Toggle the Guild panel (members, ranks, bank).
commands.notes: Wave 3 RBAC migration : audit log only (toggle UI client-side).

commands.description: Toggle the Auction House panel (browse, bid, post).
commands.notes: Wave 3 RBAC migration : audit log only (toggle UI client-side).

commands.description: Toggle the Loot Roll panel + Simulate button (debug).
commands.notes: Wave 1 RBAC : le client envoie /loot au master (audit + role administrator), le toggle UI est applique localement independamment de la reponse. Le bouton Simulate Roll lui-meme reste gate cote serveur via LootHandler.

commands.description: Print current sky state (timeOfDay, sunDir, moonPhase, illumination) to client log.
commands.notes: Wave 1 RBAC : commande lecture seule (player allowed) mais le master log la tentative d'inspection. Le client dump le DayNight state local au ACK Ok.

commands.description: Override local time of day (debug preview, master state inchange).
commands.notes: Wave 1 RBAC : le master valide hours dans [0..24) + role administrator. Override visuel uniquement, l'etat serveur du cycle jour/nuit reste inchange.

commands.description: Override local lunar phase (debug preview, master state inchange).
commands.notes: Pilot migration AdminCommand RBAC : client envoie au master (opcode 195) qui valide le role administrator + log audit, master repond Ok+result (opcode 196), client applique l'override visuel uniquement apres ACK. Valid phases 0..15 (NewMoon..EarthshineLate).

commands.description: Toggle the GM Ticket panel (submit support ticket, read replies).
commands.notes: Wave 3 RBAC migration : audit log only (toggle UI client-side).

commands.description: Add a player to the ignore list (or refresh list when no arg).
Remove a player from the ignore list.
List online players matching a filter.
Report a player for misconduct (creates GM ticket).
Add a player to friends list.
Invite a player to your party.
Leave the current party.
Kick a player from your party (party leader only).
commands.notes: Server-side check enforces that only the party leader can kick.

commands.description: Force-disconnect a player from the server.
Ban a player account from the server.
Mute a player in chat for a duration.
Broadcast a message to all players on the shard.
Promote/demote a target account to a given role.
commands.notes: Wave 1 RBAC : applique via AccountRoleService::SetRole (DB + audit role_change). Role attendu : player/moderator/game_master/administrator. Required for testing admin-only commands without manual DB access.
